overview.title: Product Analysis Engine
overview.subtitle: The automation core at the system entrance: understand the product, define target users, find where to reach them, and determine what topics to use.
overview.description: The engine uses AI Agent orchestration to understand product definitions, infer target audiences, search platforms, and query terms, then auto-generates scanning tasks. Core outputs include domain_tags, keywords, multilingual_queries, and other structured fields.

highlights.label: AI Agent Orchestration
highlights.desc: LLM-driven multi-step reasoning chain — from product description to audience, platform, and query derivation

highlights.label: Pipeline Integration
highlights.desc: Outputs feed directly into the tasks queue, seamlessly connecting to scanners and reply modules

highlights.label: Multilingual Support
highlights.desc: Auto-generates localized queries for ja/ko/es/pt/ru, covering global communities

flow.title: 5-Step Analysis Pipeline
flow.subtitle: The complete reasoning chain from product description to scanning task enqueuing.

steps.label: Read Product Description
steps.detail: Fetch the product name, summary, URL, target languages, competitors, and reply style.

steps.label: Infer Pain Points and Audience
steps.detail: Identify the core problem the product solves, user profiles, and typical failure scenarios.

steps.label: Infer Platforms and Competitors
steps.detail: Return likely active platforms, communities, subreddits, and competitor sets.

steps.label: Generate Structured Queries
steps.detail: Output platform-specific queries for Reddit, YouTube, Google, Amazon, Quora, Twitter, HN, SO, review sites, and local-language platforms.

steps.label: Generate Tasks and Activate Project
steps.detail: Write into the tasks queue, backfill projects.domain_tags, and switch the project status to active.

prompt-fields.title: Prompt Output Fields
prompt-fields.subtitle: 10 core fields output by the engine's AI reasoning — covering domain labeling, audience definition, platform queries, and multilingual expansion.

fields.desc: Up to 3 domain tags used for platform matching and partner matching.
A single-sentence description of the audience's most critical pain point.
If the user does not provide competitors, the system infers an alternative-product list automatically.
5–10 baseline search terms that can work across platforms.
5–15 target subreddits where the product can credibly enter the conversation.
Queries used to find tutorial videos and review content.
Seed terms for Google PAA and autocomplete discovery.
Queries used to locate competitor negative reviews and similar-product commentary.
Topic and emotion terms used to capture real-time complaints.
Outputs local-platform targets and localized queries for ja / ko / es / pt / ru.

task-fields.title: Core Fields in the tasks Table
task-fields.subtitle: The data structure written to the tasks queue by the analysis engine, consumed by scanners and reply modules.

fields.desc: Each task belongs to a project and can be split for execution by platform or language batch.
The shared audience pain point used by scanners and the reply module.
Used by partner matching, report classification, and dashboard filters.
Structured query parameters for English-language platforms.
Expansion parameters and target languages for local-language platforms.
queued → scanning → completed / failed, used for scheduling and retries.

trigger.title: Engine Trigger & Configuration
trigger.subtitle: Auto-triggered on project creation. Supports manual re-analysis and prompt template overrides.
trigger.triggerNote: Trigger: after the user creates a project, the analysis engine runs asynchronously and automatically enqueues scanning tasks.

configItems.label: Auto Trigger
configItems.desc: Engine executes automatically on project creation, no manual intervention needed.

configItems.label: Manual Re-analysis
configItems.desc: Admins can trigger re-analysis to update domain_tags and query terms (overrides previous results).

configItems.label: Prompt Templates
configItems.desc: Engine AI prompt templates can be overridden via system configuration for different vertical industries.
